newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The MLCC AI-server shortage tailwind is real but industry-wide (Samsung Electro-Mechanics, Taiwan makers rising together); Samwha's company-specific moves and 52-week highs were in May. Q1 MLCC sales +24.2% YoY was already reported.

sources.label: Samwha hits upper limit on MLCC optimism
MLCC shortages return on AI server demand

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-passives residual-alpha lens: balanced MLCC/passive exposure but the tailwind is industry-wide, not Samwha-specific, and at 371% YTD it is no longer mispriced vs top residual-alpha names. No fresh company evidence since June 9; the Monitor/benchmark slot still fits, so hold.
verdicts.bull: Tight MLCC supply, AI/robotics/auto demand; underfollowed central passive node.
verdicts.neutral: Real tailwind but shared across the MLCC value chain.
verdicts.bear: 371% YTD; retail-crowded benchmark name, residual alpha compressed.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-server MLCC shortage / Yongin capacity ramp
